aka: Of Dreams in the Dream of Another Mirror
this_title: De songes au songe d’un autre miroir
trans_title: 另一面镜子里的梦中之梦
Of Dreams in the Dream of Another Mirror
introduction: The world is alive, but maybe without mirrors and images, none of it would exist. The blind create images in a different way – with sounds, textures and experiences. When you enter the rabbit hole, imagination plays the main part.
chinese_title: 另一面镜子里的梦中之梦
foreign_title: De songes au songe d’un autre miroir
